stemHtml: An aircraft suffers an engine failure on a light twin aircraft after take-off. Which of the following actions are appropriate?

options.a: Bank 7 to 10 degrees, and rudder towards the dead engine.
options.b: Bank 3 to 5 degrees, and rudder towards the live engine.
options.c: Bank 3 to 5 degrees, and rudder towards the dead engine.
options.d: Bank 7 to 10 degrees, and rudder towards the live engine.
